  "findings": [
    "Blowout evidence observed in the formwork assembly",
    "Inadequate or failed bracing/ties to resist lateral concrete pressure"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop any planned concrete pours immediately",
    "Re-align and rebuild the failed formwork sections",
    "Reinforce bracing and tie spacing to comply with ACI 347 design lateral pressure requirements",
    "Obtain engineering sign-off prior to pouring"
  ],
  "rationale": "The formwork shows clear evidence of a blowout or structural failure under load/pressure, indicating that the bracing and tie system is insufficient. Although the work is physically roughed in (70% complete), it is structurally defective and unsafe to proceed without complete remediation.",

    "ACI 347 Guide to Formwork for Concrete"
  ]
